data.title: Mumbai-Ahmedabad Bullet Train project: Railways postpones formal launch of tunneling work due to inclement weather
data.summary: The railway ministry postponed the tunnel-boring work launch for Mumbai's bullet train project due to bad weather. Despite this, tunneling work will begin immediately to avoid delays.
